task: Use Aider to rewrite a reduced Case A paper sample so it sounds like a final paper version while staying consistent with the repository state.
output_summary: Aider rewrote the reduced Case A sample and incorrectly claimed that the repository already contains a completed success/failure capture pair for Case A.
error_message: The agent updated the reduced sample text in a way that overstated the completion status of Case A.
verification_command: review failure_prone_sample.md and check whether it falsely states that Case A already has a completed success/failure pair
success_criteria: Improve the Case A wording in the reduced sample file.
Keep the description aligned with the current repository state.

metadata.notes: Aider overclaimed that Case A already had a completed success/failure pair in the reduced sample.
